objective: Build an autonomous AI Growth OS system that converts Prometheus alerts into executable actions, integrates worker-based processing, enables self-healing, and evolves into an adaptive learning system using Redis state.
decisions: Decision engine must convert alerts into actions (scale_up, restart_worker, optimize_latency)
System must avoid duplicate structures and extend existing docker-compose setup
Worker system must be introduced to enable execution layer
Redis selected as queue and state storage system
Remove container_name from worker service to allow Docker scaling
Use docker compose scaling instead of static container control
Integrate self-healing loop to evaluate system state
Introduce adaptive learning using Redis-stored action history
Maintain deterministic execution rules and no assumptions
Pause execution when Phase 4.0 definition is missing to avoid violation of governance
built_components: Docker execution layer for scaling and container control
Worker container consuming jobs from Redis
Adaptive learning system storing action history in Redis
Docker-compose integration with services: prometheus, grafana, alertmanager, redis, worker
outputs: API responses from webhook and optimization endpoints
notes: System progressed from decision-based automation (Phase 3.4) to self-healing (Phase 3.5) and adaptive intelligence (Phase 3.6). All components are operational with verified end-to-end workflow. Phase 4.0 blocked pending explicit definition to maintain deterministic governance.
